description: A customer reports receiving a suspicious email that claims to be from the bank.

nodes.task_description: Instruct the customer not to click any links and to forward the email to the bank's abuse department.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides clear, safe instructions to the customer.

nodes.task_description: Ask the customer if they entered any personal information.

expected_outcome.value: Customer confirms they did not enter any information. Agent documents this.

nodes.task_description: Recommend the customer monitor their account for any unusual activity as a precaution.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a sensible security recommendation.
